# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
- name: service_product
  url: http://product-service.com

- name: service_order
  url: http://order-service.com

routes:
- name: route_product
  protocols:
    - http
    - https
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  paths:
    - /products/
  service: service_product

- name: route_order
  protocols:
    - http
    - https
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  paths:
    - /orders/
  service: service_order

upstreams:
- name: upstream_product
  slots: 10
  targets:
  - target: product-service-instance-1:8080
  - target: product-service-instance-2:8080

- name: upstream_order
  slots: 10
  targets:
  - target: order-service-instance-1:8080
  - target: order-service-instance-2:8080

service_routes:
- service: service_product
  routes:
    - route_product

- service: service_order
  routes:
    - route_order
